keel-read.description: Read and search projectRoot only. No writes, no external paths, no shell commands.

keel-code.description: Read projectRoot; write src/, tests/, and /tmp/pi-work/ for dependencies. Shell commands require approval.

keel-explore.description: Read and search anywhere on the filesystem. No writes, no shell commands.

keel-plan.description: Read anywhere; write docs/, CONTEXT.md, and /tmp/pi-work/ for reviewing external code. Shell commands require approval. No source-tree writes.

keel-query.description: Read anywhere; write all project files but every write and shell command requires one-time approval.

keel-develop.description: Read anywhere; write all project files freely. Scripts and build tools still require approval (interpreters and build commands are not blind-trusted).

keel-build.description: Read anywhere; write all project files freely; run scripts, interpreters, and build tools without approval. Only destructive operations remain denied.
